task_context.actionable_question: What specific risk signals are active for me right now?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Treat this as a checklist: list triggered flags first, then explain each using flag_value vs threshold, severity, flag_description, and recommended_action. Keep non-triggered flags brief.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You currently have a low engagement score, which indicates that you may not be interacting with course materials as much as needed. This can impact your overall performance. Other risk flags are not triggered, suggesting that there are areas where you are performing well.

Insights: Low Engagement: Your engagement score is below the low-engagement threshold, which suggests that you might not be participating in course activities as much as you could be.

Educational implications: Improving engagement can lead to better understanding and performance in your assessments.

Recommendations: high - Set a weekly study routine and interact with course resources before assessment deadlines. - This will help you stay on track and improve your engagement with the material.

explanation.summary: You currently have a low engagement score, which indicates that you may not be interacting with course materials as much as needed. This can impact your overall performance. Other risk flags are not triggered, suggesting that there are areas where you are performing well.

insights.title: Low Engagement
insights.description: Your engagement score is below the low-engagement threshold, which suggests that you might not be participating in course activities as much as you could be.

evidence.context: Engagement score is significantly below the threshold.

educational_implications: Improving engagement can lead to better understanding and performance in your assessments.

recommendations.action: Set a weekly study routine and interact with course resources before assessment deadlines.
recommendations.rationale: This will help you stay on track and improve your engagement with the material.

confidence.reason: Data is complete and accurately reflects your current engagement status.

required_core_outputs.description: Explain each triggered flag using its value, threshold, severity, description, and recommended action when available.

evaluation_constraints.description: If no flags are triggered, state that explicitly.
Do not invent risk signals that are not present in returned flags.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
